---
title: "COHESIFY: The impact of Cohesion Policy on EU Identity (G.A. no. 693427)"
sort_year: 2018
year: "2018"
status: "Past"
funder: "Horizon 2020, REFLECTIVE-SOCIETY-2015, European Commission"
categories: [Applied Political Communication, Past]
---

**Year:** 2018
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** Horizon 2020, REFLECTIVE-SOCIETY-2015, European Commission
**Research Cluster:** Applied Political Communication
